The scene is uniquely graded with cyberpunk neon purple and blue tones overlaying the natural light, creating a surreal, high-fashion contrast. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
